title: Anti-Dumping Duty on Fabrics of Synthetic or Artificial Staple Fibers Originating from China to Remain in Effect
bodyHtml:
Following the conclusion of the expiry review investigation initiated on the imports of “woven fabrics of synthetic or artificial staple fibers” originating from the People's Republic of China, and conducted by the Directorate General for Imports of the Ministry of Trade, it has been decided that the current anti-dumping duty—44% of the CIF value—shall continue to be applied without change.

The anti-dumping duty is applied under tariff headings 5513, 5514, 5515, and 5516.

Communiqué on the Prevention of Unfair Competition in Imports (No: 2025/11)
